summary: Hand Sync & GPU Performance Fix: exact camera-overlay projection, local GPU-first HandLandmarker, and Android tracking recovery.
features: Hand guide projection reads the rendered video rectangle and cover crop instead of assuming the studio aspect ratio
Landmark mirror orientation is applied once and follows the displayed front-camera preview
Local MediaPipe GPU delegate is attempted first with deterministic CPU fallback
Lower video tracking thresholds reduce repeated full palm detection while the same hand remains visible
Normal mobile hand mode requests a lighter 320×240 capture stream and falls back there on weak measured inference
Low-latency adaptive stabilizer reduces perceived guide and drawing lag without removing jump or pinch safeguards
